_doc: BOOK01_POC_STRUCTURE.json — structural element proposals for Book 01 pages 1–20. Analysis only: no rendering changed, no book data modified. Fields: page, type (heading|subheading|center|quote), suggested_editorial (heading-lg/md/sm | align-center | indent), confidence (0–1 — see _meta.confidence_guide), start/end (char offsets in page.text from web/data/book-01.json, or null if text could not be matched), pdf_text (raw text from PDF line), json_text (verification: slice of JSON page.text at [start:end]).

_meta.source_pdf: ปฏิสัมภิทามรรค ๑ ญาณุทเทส มาติกา ๗๓.pdf

match_quality_guide.exact: Exact substring found — start/end are precise char offsets
match_quality_guide.normalized: Found after stripping spaces/punctuation — covers the whole JSON line
match_quality_guide.sara_am_repair: Found after repairing 'กา หนด'→'กำหนด' PDF artifact — covers whole JSON line
match_quality_guide.consonant: Found via consonant skeleton (Thai vowel transposition in PDF) — covers whole JSON line
match_quality_guide.head: Found by unique 15-char prefix — covers whole JSON line; verify json_text
match_quality_guide.null: Not matched — start/end are null; admin must set offset manually by selecting text in reader

confidence_guide.>=0.90: High — strong font/position signal, safe to apply
confidence_guide.0.70-0.89: Medium — likely correct, spot-check against PDF
confidence_guide.0.50-0.69: Low — plausible but needs manual verification
confidence_guide.<0.50: Very low — offset not found in JSON or weak signal

classification_rules.heading: sz>=20 AND bold AND x0>=140 (centered section label)
classification_rules.subheading: sz=18 AND bold AND 85<=x0<=130 (definition/verse bold at standard margin)
classification_rules.center: sz=18 AND bold AND x0>=150 AND text_width<=200 (narrow centered label)
classification_rules.quote: 2+ consecutive sz=18 non-bold lines with x0>=132 (indented block)
